name: sdk
description: temi is an unparalleled robotic platform introducing a new dimension of development - movement. Using temi’s SDK, developers can create new functionalities and introduce new use cases via temi’s Android tablet. temi’s movement and navigation capabilities run off of it's Linux computer and uses a set of 16 sensors including a Lidar, depth cameras, driving cameras, and microphones. We encourage our developer community to suggest and request expanded functionality within the SDK and we will adhere to your needs. We want to enable you to create skills like never seen before!  We will be constantly improving the SDK and its documentation. Please feel free to reach out to us with any questions or thoughts at developers@robotemi.com
